PermissionSet.description: Wraps the Bypass_Lead_Attribution custom permission. Assign to the backfill/admin/integration users BEFORE activating the Require_Attribution_On_Qualification validation rule so mass backfill and system-created Leads do not trip the rule. Activation order: assign this set, backfill LeadSource, then activate the rule (Nic authority, gated on OQ-010).
PermissionSet.label: Bypass Lead Attribution
